T4.title: Update ProjectSeeder to use ProjectLoader

1.1.evidence: Ran 'php artisan migrate:fresh --seed --database=sqlite' in app container successfully.

1.2.evidence: Verified via tinker that Project::count() returns 3 projects on SQLite connection.

2.1.evidence: ProjectSeeder reads database/data/projects.json and inserts records successfully.

2.2.evidence: ProjectLoaderTest unit tests check that ProjectLoader throws RuntimeException on missing/malformed json.

3.1.evidence: PortfolioTest feature test 'it falls back to projects from JSON file when database connection fails' passes.

3.2.evidence: PortfolioTest feature test 'it falls back to config fallback projects when database connection fails and JSON loading fails' passes.
